Friend,
By now, you may be familiar with Governor Holcomb’s Next Level Jobs Program.

The Next Level Jobs program is helping Hoosiers throughout our state build in-demand skills -- in fields like manufacturing, construction, logistics, technology, and life sciences. It’s putting Hoosiers to work!

**While jobs are crucial to our economy and way of life, Governor Holcomb knows there are even more ways to keep Indiana growing strong – and his 2019 Next Level Agenda proves it.**

**Here are the five pillars that will take Indiana to the Next Level in 2019:**
1. We will continue growing our economy by passing Indiana’s eighth-straight balanced budget and modernizing economic development tools to increase competitiveness, economic diversity and flexibility.

2. Infrastructure is linking Hoosiers to each other and the world. Our plan will see I-69 completed by 2024 (three years early!), as well as expand high-speed broadband to unserved communities, making it available to even more Hoosiers.

3. We will stand with Hoosiers at every step of their education, and ensure that Indiana schools have the flexibility to develop partnerships to expose students to career opportunities earlier in their education.

4. To promote public health, we will fight harder than ever to beat the drug epidemic and lower infant mortality. We will also adopt school safety recommendations, including more mental health tools and physical safety enhancements.

5. Hoosiers deserve great government service, and that begins with upgrades in technology systems across state government.

**[Governor Holcomb’s plan will benefit all Hoosiers in 2019, but it can’t be nearly as successful without your support. If you want to take Indiana to the Next Level, add your name to support Governor Holcomb’s plan!](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=776f3f7b5ec54143ab275b4c9043bbd0&_e=sDV3lI0j6WUZe_C8Ubk0KDpFndkOy-WOPjB55HdE2FKb8j00kJb1wk_URx9X5moLjea6ohajYWH75FyBlWw0ukYJD7O4lK8XUJYX10-ZweD9wW5ohCavPx2bpE5aHCns-u68RDyxeSbxfHS7_KqwKEDd-hsnobEv3Dj6d7p0g8BpoAqs5zNm9iRLeFqMgHBpV4_RKrPtZBraEM1Js3aw_zd0hRyTSjGtksQpEs-Xt6YzRDjN3vcSUmElRah4MLF5JFy99Eix7BzvuLu3Lo1HbHAQ5MC4qYaW3kuR5Trxcj7s-d5dBV0kbkcuOwK0gT_YnpAPiNGJw4wGLsTq9luDWoA5hWOlz4PdTqVhdaZJ4W7EdAUgck4knu9WR657Vg-XYnufLAoTVXa3voqmuIq__APzCpvtE684nv61XirkCk4%3D)**

subject: Here is the crisis Democrats say doesn’t exist
body:
One of the biggest lies told about immigration is that border security is anti-immigrant. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b19bc34d0a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 29, 2019
---
| | |
# **Here is the crisis Democrats say doesn’t exist**

**One of the biggest lies **told about immigration is that border security is anti-immigrant. Legal immigrants and American citizens alike—not to mention our brave law enforcement officers—are the victims of lawlessness at our Nation’s doorstep every single day.

**Consider these stats.** In just the past 2 years, U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) officers arrested more than 260,000 criminals who exploited our broken immigration system. This list includes those charged with or convicted of nearly 100,000 assaults, 30,000 sex crimes, and 4,000 homicides.

**That’s the debate at hand.** One side thinks the murder of 4,000 people is a crisis that our Government is accountable for solving. The other says it’s a “manufactured” problem.

**No one argues** that border security will stop all crime in America. We need other steps—such as the [criminal justice reform signed into law](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8e38b3d74c&e=3ee4985eea) by President Donald J. Trump last month—to make our communities safer, as well. But there is no question that better border security will save lives. Pretending it won’t is Washington cynicism at its worst.

**Americans can no longer afford** for Congress to punt on this issue. The consequences of a broken immigration system aren’t going away on their own. For example, in just the past _6 weeks_ alone:
* A U.S. Border Patrol officer was [assaulted by a criminal alien](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b9d5e64ac1&e=3ee4985eea) that crossed the border in Arizona.

* Two [suspected MS-13 gang members](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d314b619f8&e=3ee4985eea) from Honduras were arrested last week after they illegally entered the United States.

* A group of [306 Central Americans gave themselves up](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2387ac8793&e=3ee4985eea) to Border Patrol agents in the Arizona desert, where smugglers often leave sick or abused migrants for dead after they cross the border illegally.

* Border Patrol officers arrested [four narcotics smugglers](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e68842e4c&e=3ee4985eea) in Texas—discovering more than 190 pounds of drugs.

* Border Patrol agents arrested [two convicted sex offenders](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e1c0e11eec&e=3ee4985eea) in Arizona, both convicted of crimes involving minors.

[Watch how smugglers easily exploit America’s southern border.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3fd080defb&e=3ee4985eea)

**Get the facts:** [A crisis that is too urgent to ignore](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4f54cd4d3b&e=3ee4985eea)

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Some big news to share about the State of the Union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
I'm honored to share this important news with you |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa67c/34a064cc/49bf37c/70c5b9b/675249958/VEsH/ "https://www.fairfightgeorgia.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=IE190130SOTUResponse1&source=IE190130SOTUResponse1")

| | | Friend, At a moment when our nation needs to hear from leaders who can unite for a common purpose, I am honored to announce that I've been invited to deliver the State of the Union response. I plan to deliver a vision for prosperity and equality, where everyone in our nation has a voice and where each of those voices is heard. **Will you join our supporters and tune in for the #AbramsAddress?** **[Find an official watch party near you](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa67c/34a064cc/49bf37c/70c5b98/675249958/VEsE/ "https://www.fairfightaction.com/abramsaddress?&refcode=IE190130SOTUResponse1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=2+-+Find+an+official+watch+party+near+you&utm_campaign=IE190130SOTUResponse1&source=IE190130SOTUResponse1"), or [fill out this form to get in touch with our team and learn how you can host your own](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa67c/34a064cc/49bf37c/70c5b99/675249958/VEsF/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeHbKdj8x5U3B4lVrhlIYq39z2hmwGqW-o0fJONszFlj5J8Kg/viewform?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=3+-+fill+out+this+form+to+get+in+touch+with+&utm_campaign=IE190130SOTUResponse1&source=IE190130SOTUResponse1").** I grew up in a family that knew firsthand that while success would not be a guarantee, we lived in a nation that gave us the best shot at opportunity. But we are facing a crisis of leadership in Washington, and families no longer have the guarantees they've worked for their whole lives. Next Tuesday after the State of the Union address, I will deliver an alternate vision that seeks to unite Americans around our common values and goals, and details for Americans how we can move forward in a way that lifts all of us up. **[Find a watch party near you](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa67c/34a064cc/49bf37c/70c5ba6/675249958/VEsC/ "http://www.fairfightaction.com/abramsaddress?&refcode=IE190130SOTUResponse1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=4+-+Find+a+watch+party+near+you&utm_campaign=IE190130SOTUResponse1&source=IE190130SOTUResponse1"), or [let us know if you'd like to host your own.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa67c/34a064cc/49bf37c/70c5ba7/675249958/VEsD/ "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeHbKdj8x5U3B4lVrhlIYq39z2hmwGqW-o0fJONszFlj5J8Kg/viewform?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=5+-+let+us+know+if+yoursquod+like+to+host+yo&utm_campaign=IE190130SOTUResponse1&source=IE190130SOTUResponse1")** I look forward to sharing my vision with you next Tuesday. Stacey Abrams P.S. Since the conclusion of my campaign for Governor, I've been leading the fight for fair elections here in Georgia. **Text FAIR to 70700** to stay up to date on our progress to reform our elections and expand access to democracy for all.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Crisis at Our Southern Border Is Real and Growing Worse Without the Wall
body:
"The federal government has reopened, but the talking points pushed by the Democrats about the southern border remain the same..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2324c1b867&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Crisis at Our Southern Border Is Real and Growing Worse Without the Wall**

“The federal government has reopened, but the talking points pushed by the Democrats about the southern border remain the same. They falsely say ‘there is no crisis.’ They claim that a barrier or wall would do nothing to curb illegal immigration or drug smuggling, which is demonstrably untrue,” Buck Sexton writes in _The Hill_.

For example, “human smugglers for the cartels use the surrender of family units as a diversionary tactic. Once Border Patrol is engaged in one area, the smugglers will use that opportunity to run drugs onto American soil.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=444c4aeadb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “As a former Department of Homeland Security (DHS) special agent on the southern border who fought sex trafficking for over a decade, I can say with certainty that the issue of the border wall should be not about power and partisan politics. It should be about the children – the tens of thousands of them who have been and are being trafficked into the U.S. and forced into the commercial sex trade,” Timothy Ballard writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1eb6d7b2a0&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| In 2006, Matthew Hemsley arrived in America on a working visa to help establish a church in Charlotte, he recounts in _[The Washington Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=890a578206&e=3ee4985eea)_. “By now, my three daughters had grown up in the United States. This was their home. I wanted to secure my wife and my children’s futures here,” Hemsley writes. “Twelve years later, on Jan. 19, I had one of the most surreal moments of my life: I was naturalized as a U.S. citizen in the Oval Office by President Trump.”
---
|
---
| “Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) announced Tuesday that it arrested 118 illegal immigrants in New York in a five-day raid this month, more than 107 of whom were convicted criminals or had pending charges against them -- and the agency slammed local politicians for protecting them and endangering the public,” Adam Shaw reports in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7060e7cc60&e=3ee4985eea). “Now that many sanctuary cities, including New York City, do not honor ICE detainers, these individuals, who often have significant criminal histories, are released onto the street, presenting a potential public safety threat,” ICE said in a statement Tuesday.
---
|
---
| “Private payrolls grew in January at a much faster pace than expected,” Fred Imbert reports for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1ca46b7024&e=3ee4985eea). “Companies added 213,000 jobs this month.” Moody’s Analytics Chief Economist Mark Zandi said the “job market weathered the government shutdown well” as American businesses continued to hire strongly.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e4e85be3d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=395de93433&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=a46b29caa0)
---

And it's exactly why the CEO of a giant bank just stated with regard to the next U.S. President: "It can't be Bernie." "" Just last week, the Our Revolution Texting Team turned out more than 30,000 voters for the California Democratic Party's elections. We helped to elect 646 progressives to positions within the California Democratic Party -- the biggest state party in the country. Victories like this in California and the Unity Reform Commission's success in ending superdelegate control of the Democratic nomination process are critical to leveling the playing field in U.S. politics. These victories don't happen by accident. They take constant pressure and grassroots organizing. Each of us will have to dig deep. Let's finish what we started in 2020 and get Bernie Sanders into the White House! In solidarity, Heather Gautney Executive Director Our Revolution ** ""** PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. body:
I have to say, having known Abigail since she was walking the halls in high school, it's pretty incredible to now watch her walk the halls of Congress.
| | Peter,

I have to say, having known Abigail since she was walking the halls in high school, it's pretty incredible to now watch her walk the halls of Congress.

She's leading in House of Representatives the same way she has led her life: with a commitment to service, unwavering principles, and compassion.

In her first month on the job, she has continued to make good governance a priority, joining fellow House freshmen to [talk about getting the corrosive influence of big money out of our politics](https://act.myngp.com/el/dg-btcqnQ_SKpmMTsXI1wUUVfD7r3D9HiclrFhI5cbQ=/faKvweaXZWIgfZ2fwSmJUElM-_LTPBUpbQRDvmll818=?__xts__\[0\]=68.ARCZTA_6x3P9wilDVrO92FfnYmRAzOBKDgfljq0ViRDDovMe4XpcQRqMlj5XqdHAGGdVVF8l5ZtyUj7kzM3e8c99FLvXJkDan4NJQ5NCyHxb_ZimN5tyFlQcgmYNugmU_koGepORLM8UzWT81Ctvd2Q_GcV9AeTw8c09zFSahHxWS-GM6jyOLIzs9gYoT-pBJGgKaQoJauKBKjD143wUdXsEgxntRO3WtmfM2ZmDDDgY1eKYnASzQ7TGyj2wLAY3O-c42MlJZjtmzE4zQYf31F-BIhF8_w6bY1XkmzpzGgm8IQRUdRhkR7EM_zR9e2zzBNDo0DpObpr_7b2Vmv7yGcOlG0WUlHFuk4jT4A&__tn__=-R). She stood up and fought for the millions of American families directly and indirectly affected by the partisan government shutdown, and she's working to ensure people in Washington won't recklessly shut down the government again.

**Needless to say, I 'm very proud of the work Abigail is doing to fix what's broken in Washington and get results for Central Virginia's hardworking families, but her work is _just_ beginning. [That's why I'm hoping you'll step up today with a donation of any size to become a 2019 founding donor of her next campaign.](https://act.myngp.com/el/dg-btcqnQ_SKpmMTsXI1wUUVfD7r3D9HiclrFhI5cbQ=/3RAzlVTsg4LRyX2jnI2hQKtPEG_U5qtpoPMFatVz_GQ=?refcode=em_fr_2019.01.30_b1_ads_all&amount=25)**

Adam

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Call the White House comment line and tell President Trump he can't shut down our government as a negotiating tactic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I can't guarantee he'll listen to you. But when a child is throwing a temper tantrum, you don't just give in and give them whatever toy they're demanding.
| | Derek:

On December 11th, President Trump said that he was "proud" to shut down the government over funding for a border wall.

On December 22nd, the federal government grinded to a halt and 800,000 employees began what would become a *35-day period* of worry, fear, and frustration. At the same time, millions of American families felt the impact through the disruption of critical government services like domestic violence programs and food stamps.

_President Trump was "proud" to do that!_

Like families across the country, I'm relieved that the government has reopened this week. **But the fight isn't over --on February 15th, funding for the government will run out again, forcing another shutdown, unless we can reach a long-term compromise that the president will sign.** There are no two ways about this: We must fund the government before the 15th, and we cannot ever again allow someone to hold public servants--and the American public--hostage by using a government shutdown as a negotiating tactic.

Right now, President Trump is saying that there are "less than 50-50" odds that he will sign a deal if we put it on his desk. Will he be "proud" to cause yet another shutdown?

**Call the White House comment line today and tell the president never to shut down the government again: (202) 456-1111.**

Derek, I can't guarantee he'll listen to you. In my experience, he doesn't seem to be a great listener. But when a child is throwing a temper tantrum, you don't just give in and give them whatever toy they're demanding. (In this case, billions of dollars to spend on an inefficient border security ploy that the majority of Americans don't even want!)

**Tell the president that he can't shut down the government as a negotiating tool every time he doesn't get his way: (202) 456-1111.**

I'm going to do everything in my power to stop another government shutdown from happening, and I hope you'll join me in taking action today.

Thank you,

Tim

body:
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976903/2ae112ef/166ff6c4/357a2d04/2557420430/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976903/2ae112ef/166ff6c4/357a2d04/2557420430/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Hey Peter, I'm Stefanie, Kirsten's national finance director. It's my job to make sure we have the resources we need to power this campaign, and right now we're coming up on our first critical fundraising goal.
Before I ask you to invest in this campaign, I want to tell you what we're focused on: introducing voters in key early states to Kirsten. Because when people know Kirsten, when they know her courage and compassion and see what a fighter she is, they get fired up to support her.
To build a campaign that brings Kirsten to voters across the country, we need digital ads, print materials for our volunteers and travel to key primary states - she'll be in New Hampshire this weekend and in South Carolina soon after. But that all takes significant resources - resources we don't have enough of right now.
Now's the part where I ask you to make a donation. We have a finance plan with budgets each month, and we're falling $27,000 short this month with just one day left. **Missing our first major campaign goal will be a huge blow, and since we 're not accepting any money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists and won't have an individual super PAC, we depend on this team to power our campaign.**
**[Kirsten is committed to taking on Trump and fighting for you and your family. That's why she's running. But to keep building this campaign, it's critical we meet our January goal. Will you give $5 right now to make sure Kirsten can keep fighting for you?](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976903/2ae112ef/166ff6c4/357a2d07/2557420430/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3MTgtZnItbm9uLWFiZWwtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2718-fr-non-abel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2718-fr-non-abel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2718-fr-non-abel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2718-fr-non-abel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976903/2ae112ef/166ff6c4/357a2d07/2557420430/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3MTgtZnItbm9uLWFiZWwtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2718-fr-non-abel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
I'm so proud of this campaign we're building and the people who have made it possible. Thanks for all you do.
Stefanie
